home.heroSub: Fresh from the tandoor. Spices from India. Made with love in Leyweg.
home.storyH2: A Taste of India, Right Here in Den Haag
home.storyP1: Arun Chopra opened Chopras Indian Restaurant on Leyweg in Den Haag in 2023 with a single ambition: serve Indian food exactly as it is meant to be. The spices are sourced directly from India and ground fresh every morning in our kitchen  -  not from a bag, not from a supplier's blend. The tandoor is fired up hours before the first guest arrives. The recipes come from kitchens in Delhi, Mumbai and Rajasthan, carried across without modification.
home.storyP2: Every dish here is the real thing  -  not adapted, not simplified, not dialled back for a European palate. The butter chicken is built the same way it is in Delhi: tandoor-cooked chicken first, then a slow tomato and cream sauce with spices that were whole yesterday and ground this morning. The pani puri arrives the way it does on a Mumbai street corner  -  ice-cold filling, crispy shell, one explosive bite that you will immediately want to repeat.
home.storyP3: Den Haag has a long relationship with South Asian food  -  the largest Hindustani community in the Netherlands lives here, and they know the difference between a shortcut and the real thing. Chopras is built for that audience and for anyone who wants to eat the way it actually tastes in India. We are not trying to appeal to everyone. We are trying to cook well. Come hungry.
home.storyP4: The tandoor we use reaches 480 degrees. That temperature is not adjustable — it is what gives naan its char on the edges and chicken tikka its smoky crust. You cannot fake that in a conventional oven and we would not try. Every morning before service, the tandoor is lit. Every evening after service, it is cleaned. That discipline is the difference between a restaurant and a kitchen that happens to serve food.
home.storyP5: We are on Leyweg. Not in the centre, not in a tourist corridor. We chose Leyweg deliberately — it is where Den Haag actually lives. Come find us.
home.featuredH2: Our Most Loved Indian Dishes in Den Haag
home.featuredSub: Butter chicken Den Haag · Biryani Den Haag · and 87 more dishes, all made fresh daily.
home.whyH2: Why Den Haag Keeps Coming Back to Chopras
home.why1H3: We Do Not Cut Corners on Spices
home.why1P: Our masalas come directly from India and are ground fresh in our kitchen every morning before service. Not from a pre-mixed bag. Not from a supplier's blend. The volatile aromatic oils in cumin, cardamom and coriander begin evaporating within hours of grinding  -  that freshness is what you taste in every dish, and it is the one thing we will never compromise on.
home.why2H3: A Table for Everyone in Den Haag
home.why2P: 100% halal certified  -  not an option on the menu, the whole kitchen. Vegetarian and vegan dishes clearly labelled on every menu. Wheelchair accessible. Baby friendly. Pet friendly on the terrace. Whether you are bringing the whole family, celebrating something special, or just hungry on a Tuesday evening  -  you are welcome here, and there is something on the menu you will want to order again.
home.why3P: We run a full catering operation and a private event hall at Leyweg for groups of 25 to 80 guests. Nikah receptions, corporate dinners, Diwali celebrations, birthday parties  -  we handle everything from first enquiry to final dish so you can actually enjoy your own event. Serving Den Haag, Rijswijk, Delft, Zoetermeer and beyond.
home.reviewsH2: What Den Haag Says About Us
home.reviewsSub: Real guests. Real meals. Real opinions.
home.review1Text: We came for a birthday dinner and stayed two hours longer than planned. The chilli paneer was extraordinary  -  bold, crispy, the right amount of heat. Staff treated us like family from the moment we walked in. Best Indian food in Den Haag, full stop.
home.review2Text: Stopped here on a whim after seeing it on Google and I am genuinely glad I did. The soya chaap is unlike anything I have had before  -  smoky, marinated, completely addictive. My Dutch friends who had never eaten Indian food before are now regulars. That says everything.
home.review3Text: As a Muslim family, finding a restaurant that is genuinely halal-certified and also serves food this good is rare. Chopras ticks every box. The kids loved the butter chicken, my husband ordered the mutton rogan josh and we are already planning our next visit.
home.cateringH2: Indian Catering and Private Events in Den Haag
home.cateringP: Planning an event in Den Haag? Whether it is a wedding reception for 80 guests, a corporate dinner, a birthday party, or a Diwali celebration  -  Chopras delivers the full Indian catering experience directly to your venue. We serve Den Haag, Rijswijk, Delft, Zoetermeer, Voorburg and Leidschendam. Every menu is customised. Every dish is made fresh.
home.locationH2: Find Us at Leyweg, Den Haag
home.faqH2: Frequently Asked Questions About Chopras Indian Restaurant
home.ctaSub: Your table is waiting at Leyweg 986, Den Haag. Open Tuesday to Sunday.

menu.heroH1: Indian Restaurant Menu in Den Haag
menu.heroSub: 89 dishes made fresh daily. Every spice sourced from India. Fully halal certified. Open Tuesday to Sunday.
menu.allergenText: If you have any allergies or dietary requirements, please tell our staff before you order. We handle nuts, dairy, gluten and other common allergens in our kitchen. Allergen information is always available  -  just ask. Required disclosure under EU Regulation No. 1169/2011.
menu.ctaSub: Book your table at Chopras on Leyweg, or order online through Thuisbezorgd or Uber Eats  -  delivery across Den Haag.

catering.heroSub: For events that people actually remember. Weddings, corporate dinners, birthday parties and cultural celebrations  -  we bring the full Indian experience to your venue.
catering.serviceH2: Authentic Indian Catering Across Den Haag and Surrounding Areas
catering.serviceP1: Hiring Chopras for your event means getting an actual Indian restaurant at your venue  -  not a catering company that happens to do Indian food. Our chefs are the same chefs who cook in our kitchen on Leyweg every night. The spices are the same spices ground fresh every morning. The biryani your guests eat at your event is the same biryani people drive across Den Haag to order.
catering.serviceP2: Every menu is built from scratch for your event  -  your date, your guest count, your dietary requirements. Halal as standard, no exceptions. Vegetarian and vegan options included without being asked. One call or email starts the conversation, and we handle everything from there.
catering.eventsH2: Indian Catering for Every Type of Event in Den Haag
catering.hallH2: Our Private Event Hall in Den Haag
catering.hallP1: Our private event hall at Leyweg 986 holds 25 to 80 guests and is set with vibrant Indian décor  -  hand-selected artwork, warm amber lighting and richly coloured textiles that make every event look and feel distinctive. Guests notice when they walk in. The space is regularly used as a photography backdrop for exactly that reason.
catering.hallP2: We have hosted Nikah receptions, Diwali dinners, engagement parties, team celebrations, yoga sessions, dance workshops and charity evenings in this hall. The layout is arranged for your specific event  -  seated dinner, standing reception, mixed format. You arrive to a room that is ready for your guests.
catering.hallP3: One thing we should mention honestly: the event hall is upstairs and is not wheelchair accessible. The main restaurant is fully accessible. If accessibility is a requirement, please let us know and we will discuss how to accommodate you.
catering.whyH2: Why Businesses and Families in Den Haag Choose Chopras for Catering
catering.why1Copy: No pre-packaged catering. No box-company shortcuts. Every dish is prepared fresh by our own chefs, with the same spices ground in-house and the same techniques as our restaurant kitchen. Your guests will notice  -  and they will ask you who did the food.
catering.why2Copy: From your first message to the last dish cleared, we manage the lot. You do not chase suppliers or field questions from multiple vendors. One point of contact. One team. Zero coordination headaches on your side.
catering.why3Copy: Every meat dish at every Chopras event is sourced from halal-certified suppliers  -  no exceptions, no surcharges. We do not offer halal as an option or an upgrade. It is how we work, always.
catering.why4Copy: We have catered events for 200+ guests without a drop in quality. Scaling up means more staff, more prep, more logistics  -  not pre-cooked food or shortcuts. The guest at table 12 gets the same quality as the guest at table 1.
catering.faqH2: Frequently Asked Questions  -  Indian Catering in Den Haag

catering.event2Copy: Professional catering for business events, team dinners, product launches and networking evenings in Den Haag.
catering.event3Copy: From intimate family celebrations to large birthday parties  -  we bring the food, you bring the people.
catering.event4Copy: Intimate events deserve exceptional food. We cater baby showers, proposals, anniversaries and engagement parties across Den Haag.
catering.event5Copy: Authentic Indian festival catering for Diwali, Holi, Eid, Karwa Chauth and other cultural celebrations in Den Haag.

vacancy.heroH1: Work at Chopras  -  Join Den Haag's Fastest Growing Indian Restaurant
vacancy.heroSub: We are building something real here. If you love food, people and a team that actually has each other's backs  -  read on.
vacancy.cultureP1: Working at Chopras is not a script-following exercise. It is being part of a kitchen and front-of-house team that genuinely cares  -  about getting the food right, about making guests feel welcome, and about having each other's backs on a busy Saturday night.
vacancy.cultureP2: We opened in 2023 and we are growing  -  which means real opportunities for people who want to grow with us. Our chefs are learning and passing on techniques every day. Our front-of-house team know regulars by name within a few weeks. If you stay, you grow. If you grow, so do we.
vacancy.cultureP3: We want people who take pride in their work, show up when they say they will, and bring actual energy to a shift. Attitude matters more than experience. The skills, we can teach.
vacancy.applyH2: Apply for a Position at Chopras Indian Restaurant
vacancy.vacancy1Schedule: Tuesday to Sunday · Evenings and weekends
vacancy.vacancy1Desc: You know your way around a tandoor. You understand that the difference between good and great is in the masala  -  and you care enough to grind it fresh. At Chopras, we are looking for a chef who does not just cook Indian food, they live it. If you have worked in an Indian kitchen and you are ready to bring those skills to one of Den Haag's most talked-about restaurants, let us talk.
vacancy.vacancy2Desc: You are a people person. You remember regulars' names. You can explain the difference between a samosa and a dahi puri without reading from a card  -  and you do it with genuine warmth. Chopras needs front-of-house staff who match the energy of the food. Restaurant experience is a bonus but personality matters more.
vacancy.vacancy3Desc: Chopras runs a busy private event hall and a catering operation that takes us to venues across Den Haag and beyond. We need reliable, energetic people who take pride in making events run without a hitch. This is physical work  -  setup, service, breakdown  -  and it is genuinely satisfying when an event goes perfectly.
vacancy.formSuccess: Thank you for your application. We will be in touch.
vacancy.formError: Something went wrong. Please email us at info@chopras.nl.
